steps.title: Use a two-point table
steps.content: The line passes through $(0,21)$ and has slope 4. Move 1 unit right and 4 units up to get another point, $(1,25)$. Fit those two points in Desmos.

steps.title: Write the equation using slope-intercept form
steps.content: The regression returns slope $4$ and intercept $21$, so $$f(x)=4x+21.$$ That matches choice D, so D is correct.
